A durable foundation

Velodrome is the world’s first MetaDEX, combining elegant design, intelligent incentives and battle-tested technology to deliver the next generation of liquidity infrastructure.

Engineered for endurance

  • 100% of fees and incentives go to users
  • The most powerful pools in one platform
  • Incentives aligned for performance

Driven by vision

  • Immutable and permissionless code
  • Onchain governance and operations
  • Leading-edge interoperability

Different from the start

  • $0 VC funding
  • Zero token sales
  • Founded as public good

How it works

Protocol incentives and mechanics are thoughtfully designed to sustain long term value creation.
